name: Osom
tagline: AI-powered real estate chatbot with WhatsApp integration and RAG
description: An intelligent real estate assistant that helps clients find properties through natural conversation via WhatsApp. Uses RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) with pgvector embeddings to match property listings to client preferences including budget, location, property type, and amenities. Supports multi-tenant architecture for multiple real estate agencies.
highlights: RAG-powered property search using OpenAI embeddings and pgvector
WhatsApp chatbot integration for natural language property queries
Multi-tenant architecture supporting multiple real estate agencies
Conversational AI that extracts preferences (budget, location, type) from chat
Token usage tracking and billing per client
